content: Remote OK Security Officer Buckeye Partners Buckeye is the premier infrastructure and logistics provider for the worldâs energy needs, both today and tomorrow. Since 1886, we have successfully navigated transitions in the way energy has been distributed to continually meet the needs of an evolving market and industry environment. Our people are a critical element to the success and longevity of our operational history and our future as we seek to thrive through the energy transition.<br><br>We own and operate a diversified global network of integrated assets providing midstream logistic solutions, primarily consisting of the transportation, storage, processing, and marketing of liquid petroleum products. We are committed to safely and responsibly providing world-class service to meet the continually evolving energy needs of our customers and the communities we serve. As part of this commitment to our customers, we are continually diversifying our platform and service offerings to enable less carbon intensive energy solutions and undertaking decarbonization efforts on our operations.<br><br>Buckeye Partners is currently seeking a <strong>Security Officer</strong> with to join our team!<br><br><strong>Role Summary<br><br></strong>Ensure enforcement of Buckeye Bahamas ISPS security protocols.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities &amp; Essential Functions Include<br><br></strong><ul><li>Ensure ISPS security procedures are enforced and make recommendations to improve same.</li><li>Perform routine security patrols as required.</li><li>Maintain a detailed dairy of activities at all security positions.</li><li>Ensure non security personnel are not permitted in the guard houses, or surveillance room unless authorized </li><li>Ensure vehicles and personnel effects of individuals entering and exiting Buckeye Bahamasâ facilities are searched as indicated by Security Specialist.</li><li> Ensure all personnel entering Buckeye Bahamas facility are in possession of a valid Buckeye Bahamas identification badge.</li><li>Provide relief for the surveillance Officer and monitor surveillance systems (CCTV) to avoid breach of Buckeye Bahamasâ facility.</li><li>Ensure all materials entering Buckeye Bahamasâ facility are accompanied by a contractorâs manifest the contents of which must be confirmed by security. On exit the manifest must be cross referenced with goods exiting then facility.</li><li>Ensure all goods exiting Buckeye Bahamasâ facilities not accounted for on a contractor's manifest is accompanied by a properly authorized goods outwards note. </li><li>Maintain control of both vehicular and pedestrian traffic at Buckeye Bahamasâ entrance and exit points.</li><li>Recognize and correct safety breeches observed within the facility. </li><li>Immediately report any observed security breaches to Safety/ Security Officer.</li><li>Maintain good communications with duty Shift Lead and Safety Officers.</li><li>Report security breaches to duty Shift Lead and Security Specialist.</li><li>Maintain a log of security equipment malfunctioning and follow up to ensure deficiencies are corrected in a timely manner.</li><li>And other duties as assigned.<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Position Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li>High school diploma or its equivalent</li><li>Related experience. </li><li>Must have a solid understanding of basic security procedures and possess in-depth knowledge of the regulatory requirements pertaining to ISPS. </li><li>Must possess the knowledge and skills required to respond to effectively respond to emergencies. </li><li>Proficiency using Microsoft Office Suite is required.<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Certificates &amp; Licenses<br><br></strong><ul><li>ISPS certified<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Other Skills, Attributes And Abilities<br><br></strong><ul><li>This position requires someone who is proactive, energetic, people orientated, balanced disposition. </li><li>Exceptional written and oral communication skills and strong interpersonal skills are required. </li><li>The ability to handle confidential matters in a tactful and professional manner.</li><li>The employee may be exposed to a hazardous working environment and must be able to work in adverse weather conditions.</li><li>This position consists of office and field environment.<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Essential Functions<br><br></strong><ul><li>This position requires the ability to safely and successfully perform essential job functions consistent with HSSE guidelines, and local regulatory requirements</li><li>This role requires the ability to maintain regular, punctual attendance consistent with the current HR policies.</li><li>This position requires compliance with all personnel policies.<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Physical &amp; Safety Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li>This person must perform physical activities that require considerable use of arms and legs and moving your whole body, such as lifting, walking, and handling of materials. </li><li>Position may require exposure to adverse weather conditions, hazardous environments and require the physical stamina to work 12 hours shifts.</li><li>Required use of all safety equipment in performance of job.<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>About You<br><br></strong>To be successful in the Buckeye culture, our employees must possess a demonstrated commitment to environmental responsibility and regulatory compliance. Excellent communication, both written and verbal, as well as strong organizational skills are paramount. You must work independently and be able to exercise tact, discretion, and professionalism when dealing with internal and external customers, and when handling sensitive and confidential information. Buckeye wants to create and reward an organizational focus that stimulates the creative and entrepreneurial actions of its employees that result in innovative ways of reducing costs, generating revenues, improving productivity, or improving processes.<br><br><strong>Our People First Culture<br><br></strong>From managing over 5,000 miles of pipeline to commercializing clean energy projects, our people collaborate to provide world-class service and meet the changing energy needs of our customers. Our employee-first culture means that we invest in our employees and equip them to be fully contributing members of high performing teams. We are focused on collaboration, inclusion, empowerment, accountability, and professional development. We want the best in you to bring out the best in us.â¯Join us as we work together to build a business that is responsive to the needs of the future while continuing to serve the energy needs of communities today. training, supervisor, code Freeport Ridge Estate, 2026-05-23T09:36:41+00:00 1132032 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-security-officer-buckeye-partners-1132032 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Profesores de EspaÃ±ol como lengua extranjera Apprentus PROFESORES/AS DE ESPAÃOL COMO LENGUA EXTRANJERA (ELE)<br><br>Si buscas un proyecto educativo dinÃ¡mico, flexible y en crecimiento, esta oportun
